## About DEG
DEG specializes in international development finance, focusing on providing financial and advisory services to private sector enterprises in emerging and developing countries. The company offers loans, equity investments, and comprehensive advisory services to support sustainable development and renewable energy projects. DEG primarily serves sectors such as banking, manufacturing, trade, services, infrastructure, and renewable energy. It was founded in 1962 and is based in Cologne, Germany. In September 2001, DEG was acquired by KfW.

[DEG invests €15 Million in Adenia Entrepreneurial Fund I to back African mid‑market growth](https://innovation-village.com/deg-invests-e15-million-in-adenia-entrepreneurial-fund-i-to-back-african-mid-market-growth/)
Mar 30, 2026
German development finance institution DEG has announced that it has finalized a €15 million investment in the Adenia Entrepreneurial Fund I (AEF I), a fund managed by long‑established African private equity firm Adenia Partners.
